title: Caramel Crunch Bake
description: A nutty and juicy American dish featuring a blend of crunchy caramelized nuts atop a moist cake-like base, perfect for meal-prep with no eggs.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine flour and melted butter. Mix until smooth.
Stir in sugar and salt. Mix well to incorporate all ingredients thoroughly.
Fold in almond meal gently but ensure no lumps form. Stir evenly.
Pour half of the mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
In another mixing bowl, mix caramel sauce mix with chocolate chips. Set aside.
Gently fold in chopped nuts over remaining batter and spread evenly.
Drizzle caramel sauce over top layer, ensuring it's fully coated but not soggy.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown around edges.
